question: Are the per-point captures present, complete, and usable?
operator_action: May need to re-occupy affected points
aggregator: mean − k × (100 − min) across GCP-role per_point_completeness, k=0.25

question: Is the per-point operator metadata trustworthy?
operator_action: Re-measure / re-enter / select correct device on form
aggregator: mean − k × (100 − min) across GCP-role per_point_setup_confidence, k=0.25

question: Was the sky/site environment good at each point?
aggregator: mean − k × (100 − min) across GCP-role per_point_environment, k=0.25
